This folder contains workflow files prepared for moving `screenshot-editor` into its own repository.

Important notes:

- GitHub Actions only executes workflows from the repository root `.github/workflows` directory.
- Because this project currently lives inside another repository, these workflows do not run here.
- The active deployment for this repository remains `/Users/dafnik/Documents/Projects/personal/Dafnik/.github/workflows/deploy.yml`.
- Once `screenshot-editor` is moved to its own repository, copy these files to that repository root at `.github/workflows`.
